title: Shroome's Buildtacular
description: An all purpose building and content mod, focusing on distinct themes
body:
![Shroome's Buildtacular Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2120722ee3e493d0e0b2a5cc95795a0297709b0c.png)

Welcome to **Shroome's Buildtacular**, a mod focusing on themed blocksets and features alongside them.


This mod focuses on more interesting and unique themes that aren't often represented in other mods and vanilla.

Current block sets are:
- Ancient! Soft brown tiles, bricks and glowing hardlight built by a precursor civilization (inspired by Starbound)


- Future Is Better! Dark metal panels and plates with glowing green accents, built for outposts on faraway worlds


- Necrotech! Zombies have finally  got their hands on metals, constructing factories out of rusty iron, rotting flesh and bone


- Industrial! A similar grey metal theme to F.I.B, but leaning more towards modern instead of sci-fi, also comes with concrete!

- Scrapyard! Hailing from the savannas of a canceled mod, new scrap metal blocks are found, a soft orange and utilizing the same greys as Industrial and F.I.B
